items.title: Scammers make $400K through fake Uniswap ads on Google
items.summary: A blockchain analyst has warned that malicious phishing advertisements impersonating Uniswap have appeared on Google Search, which has netted attackers at least $400,000.

items.title: Bitcoin in ‘high-risk zone’ as ETF outflows signal institutional exit: Swissblock
items.summary: This steady drip of ETF outflow continues to add to the supply side without a visible demand offset, said Glassnode.

items.title: Bitcoin options are coming to Nasdaq. Here's what it means for you
items.summary: The new offering, pending CFTC approval, aims to democratize seamless crypto risk management.

items.title: Bitcoin risks drop to $72K as demand metric hits 2026 lows
items.summary: Bitcoin’s weakening demand failed to absorb increased selling pressure, raising risks of a further BTC price drop toward $72,000.

items.title: Indonesia blocks Polymarket after bets on president’s exit
items.summary: Indonesia blocked Polymarket after users bet on President Prabowo Subianto leaving office early, citing gambling concerns and expanding global scrutiny of prediction markets.

items.title: BTC price to attack $80K shorts on Iran peace deal: Five things to know in Bitcoin this week
items.summary: Bitcoin traders predicted a short squeeze to $80,000, but a lack of overall demand and the return of leverage sparked warnings of more liquidation events to come.

items.title: Tether, Georgia plan lari-backed stablecoin GELT under new rules
items.summary: Georgia’s central bank released stablecoin rules in March covering reserve backing, issuer documents and external auditor verification.

items.title: Bitcoin is ready to beat stocks and bonds again after underperformance against Wall Street
items.summary: Former Credit Suisse global head of portfolio and Risk Dimensions CIO Mark Connors says bitcoin has broken out of its longest stretch of underperformance in history and is ready to beat stocks, bonds, and gold as inflation stubbornly sticks around.

items.title: Crypto trader sees Hyperliquid, AI tokens leading next altcoin rally
items.summary: Hyperliquid’s surge and renewed interest in AI-focused crypto projects are signaling a broader return of risk appetite in altcoins, says Michael van de Poppe.

items.title: Hyperliquid takes a swing at Polymarket with macro outcome bets
items.summary: The decentralized exchange’s new HIP-4 product lets traders bet on offchain events like inflation and interest-rate decisions, using validators rather than UMA-style external dispute resolution.

items.title: At $322 billion, the stablecoin market value exceeds the FX reserves of 95 nations
items.summary: The amount of dollars and other fiat currencies held by users outside traditional banking channels now exceeds the official FX reserves of 95 nations.

items.title: Ondo Finance founder Nathan Allman dies unexpectedly
items.summary: Tokenized real-world assets firm Ondo Finance announced the unexpected death of founder Nathan Allman on Tuesday, with longtime president Ian De Bode stepping in as CEO.

items.title: XRP slips below $1.35 after triangle breakdown puts focus on $1.30 support
items.summary: XRP lost a key support zone after another failed breakout attempt, with traders now watching whether the months-long compression pattern resolves lower.

items.title: HYPE briefly overtakes Dogecoin, privacy tokens slide as US strikes on Iran rattle markets
items.summary: ZEC and XMR dropped 5% in a session that saw most major tokens pull back after weeks of gains, with the move tracking renewed Middle East tension and a rebound in oil prices.

items.title: Bitcoin stalls near $76,500 as muted trading points to macro wait-and-see
items.summary: Enflux says “the bid is there” but no one is adding size, while Glassnode data shows easing selling pressure alongside weaker market activity.

items.title: AI agents must be treated as untrusted systems: Researchers
items.summary: AI agents are becoming increasingly popular among crypto users, with Circle CEO Jeremy Allaire predicting that billions of AI agents will be operating within five years.

items.title: Bitmine’s Tom Lee hints at stock tailwinds after firm considered for Russell 3000
items.summary: Bitmine's Tom Lee says the firm could be considered for the Russell 1000, and its stock may get a boost from active and passive fund managers.

items.title: Ondo Finance founder Nathan Allman dies aged 32
items.summary: Ondo Finance says its founder, Nathan Allman, died unexpectedly, with company president Ian De Bode to serve as CEO.

items.title: Kelp DAO says rsETH restored 5 weeks after $293M protocol hack
items.summary: Kelp DAO says that sETH mints, redemptions and rewards operations have been running smoothly since it opened withdrawals for the token earlier this month.

items.title: Bitcoin volatility falls to 8-month low: Is a BTC breakout imminent?
items.summary: Bitcoin’s 8-month low volatility can’t predict BTC’s price prediction but derivatives data does suggest that a rally to $82,000 would cause a large short squeeze.
